name: Shepherdless Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lentils, barley, grated carrots, finely chopped onion, chopped tomatoes, and their juice with the vegetable stock in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, cover the pan, and simmer until the lentils and barley are soft, about 40 minutes.
3. Boil the potatoes in their skins until cool enough to handle, then peel them and mash with milk and grated cheese.
4. Preheat the oven to Gas Mark 6 (200°C/400°F).
5. Spoon the lentil mixture into a 900ml (1 1/2 pint) pie dish.
6. Evenly layer the mashed potatoes on top.
7. Use a fork to make patterns on the potato layer.
8. Place the pie in the oven and bake for 20 minutes, or until the ridges begin to brown.
(Note: Low-fat Cheddar can be used instead of full-fat variety.)
